queries.name: tableCount
queries.query: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'

queries.name: totalRows
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(n_live_tup), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: totalIndexSize
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(pg_indexes_size(relid)), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: deadTuples
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(n_dead_tup), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: deadTupleRatio
queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN coalesce(sum(n_live_tup), 0) + coalesce(sum(n_dead_tup), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE round(sum(n_dead_tup)::numeric / (sum(n_live_tup) + sum(n_dead_tup)) * 100, 2) END AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: oldestUnvacuumed
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(extract(epoch FROM (now() - min(last_autovacuum)))::numeric, 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE last_autovacuum IS NOT NULL

queries.name: topTableSizes
queries.query: SELECT schemaname || '.' || relname AS name, pg_total_relation_size(relid) AS size, n_live_tup AS rows FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC LIMIT 10
